key_obligations.obligation: Maintain confidentiality of information marked confidential
Maintain confidentiality of information marked confidential

risk_items.description: Confidentiality term is only 2 years; industry standard is 3-5 years for technical information.
Permitted disclosures list does not expressly include auditors.
risk_items.recommendation: Add auditors to the list of permitted recipients.

unusual_clauses: Clause 9 attempts to convert confidentiality into perpetual obligation for any 'trade secret' without definition.
summary: Overall moderate-risk NDA. Term too short, missing standard injunctive-relief and return-of-materials clauses, and one unusual perpetual clause requiring definition.
